theme: juggler keeps every plate spinning without a table
title: Plate-Stack Codegen: Residency Planning for a Shared-Value DAG
strategies: naive per-output tree recompute, zero sharing awareness (trivial)
Sethi-Ullman-style DAG walk that unconditionally spills every shared value to memory (greedy)
residency planning: keep single-output ('local') shared values in the cheap top-3 shuffle window, reserve STORE/LOAD for genuinely cross-output ('far') shared values (strong)
true optimal instruction scheduling / register-allocation-style interference-graph residency assignment (open ceiling, uncovered)
